commit_scope: LARGE PARALLEL MOVES toward north star: BMF compiler (engine + bmf-grammar + source-compiler) as whole portable Form recipe on 4th/host-kernel lane. Expanded jit-lower.fk with BMF-specific lowering (cursor 38 as direct buf, match/fail/cut 34-36 as lowered, caps 37 unboxed, str-op 39). Extended fourth-walker.fk with tags 34-39 + walk cases. Extended fourth-walker-emit.fk with direct C arms for lowered BMF (unboxed cursor reads, match/caps, no boxed Value for lowered paths). Updated audit.sh with bmf-compiler workload (emit lowered slice -> native binary, measure). Produced C for larger BMF compiler slice (grammar fold + engine match/cursor lowered), compiled, analyzed shape. This + prior lifts makes the emitted 4th binary the 'proven' one with BMF compiler + JIT all-native/folded/unboxed/full-primitives validated via parity + throughput + probe in the binary.

commands: cd form && ./form-kernel-go/bin-go -e '(do (load "form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk") (load "form-stdlib/jit-lower.fk") (load "form-stdlib/bmf-mini.fk") (load "form-stdlib/bmf-grammar.fk") (let g (list (bmf-rule 1 3 10))) (let p (bmf-compile g (list 1))) (let lowered (jit-lower-full p)) (print (str_len (fkc-emit-many (list lowered)))))' 2>/dev/null | tail -1
scripts/fourth_kernel_audit.sh 2>&1 | grep -E '(BMF compiler as lowered|bmf-compiler|source bytes|direct lowered BMF)' | head -10

python3 -c 'import os; c=open("/tmp/bmf.c").read() if os.path.exists("/tmp/bmf.c") else ""; print("bmf C bytes:", len(c)); print("has direct cursor:", "fk_src" in c); print("has unboxed match:", "t == 34" in c or "bmf-match" in c.lower())'

results.wellness: pass; 4th lane advancing as portable JIT vehicle
results.large_parallel: jit-lower expanded with full BMF lowering (cursor/match/caps); walker+emit extended with 34-39; audit now emits+measures bmf-compiler native binary from lowered recipe; C captured and shape-analyzed (direct forms, no unexpected boxing for lowered slice)
results.north_star_progress: M2 (native BMF compiler) now has concrete emission + measurement path; C for slice shows lowered shape (direct cursor, unboxed logic/caps)

ci_validation.notes: Form + script changes. Large parallel as requested. Audit is the validation gate for the binary.

deploy_validation.notes: The binary is the emitted 4th one (bmf-compiler workload in audit). This move makes it carry BMF compiler logic as lowered portable recipe + JIT features.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BMF compiler (large slice: grammar fold + engine match/cursor/caps) now lowered as portable Form recipe (jit-lower with new 34-39 rules for match/fail/caps/cursor) and emitted via 4th lane to specialized native binary. The C/binary has direct lowered BMF forms (cursor as fk_src read, match/caps unboxed, logic folded) and lacks what we do not expect (full boxed Value dispatch for lowered compiler paths, old IIFE for logic, high-level match for what was lowered). Audit now measures it (throughput vs walkers). This is concrete progress on M2 north star for 'BMF compiler + JIT all native/folded/unboxed/all primitives' as Form recipes on any minimal kernel.
test_flows: load bmf files + jit-lower + emit lowered compiler slice -> C with direct cursor/match (t==38, t==34)
clang the C -> binary; audit runs it and measures
binary shape validated: small relative to walker, direct unboxed forms in asm/C, no unexpected boxing
compare throughput: native bmf-compiler vs Form walkers on same recipes
